name: WW Apple and Cheddar Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Apples, cored, peeled, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a 12 muffin pan with paper baking cups.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, and baking powder.
Add apples, corn, cheese, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg; stir to combine.
3. In a small bowl, beat eggs and oil; stir into flour mixture (do not overbeat).
4. Fill the muffin cups and bake in the center of the oven for 15 minutes.
5. Makes 12 muffins. One muffin = 1.5 F, 0.5 P, 1 B, 0.25 F, 25 calories.
